mentions.note: Also understated by Jensen despite in-house chip development. Cramer advocates owning all three (Nvidia, Amazon, Alphabet) given massive opportunity; don't force either/or choice.
Google Cloud critical infrastructure layer in AI build-out; part of five-layer AI cake alongside Azure, AWS, CoreWeave, Oracle.

YouTube (largest video platform), Waymo (number one self-driving car), Search, Gemini, Google Cloud driving trillion-dollar valuation. Cramer singles out Google Cloud as 'the best horse I want to bet on' for AI infrastructure buildout.
